headline: PASS YOUR FDA INSPECTION
subheading: Ready your UK site, rehearse your team and answer a Form 483 with confidence.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking FDA inspection readiness at a UK pharmaceutical site, set against a deep navy background. A pristine, softly lit cleanroom corridor of brushed stainless steel and frosted glass recedes into shallow depth of field, lit by a cool teal and cyan glow. In the foreground, abstract glowing checklist marks and concentric inspection-magnifier rings hover as translucent teal-cyan glass forms, suggesting scrutiny, verification and audit-trail review. A subtle fresh-green accent traces a single line of approval through floating layered document and data-trend panels, conveying meticulous quality control, regulatory compliance and methodical preparation. Calm, premium, authoritative atmosphere with crisp reflections and clean negative space. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
